member.name: T:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI
member.summary: Entry point and container for the WeatherLink Live API. Contains the client used to query a local WeatherLink Live device.

member.name: T:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive
member.summary: Client for a local WeatherLink Live device. Construct, call , then use the exposed properties to read the latest values.

member.name: M:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Initializes a new instance from an IP address string.
member.param: The WeatherLink Live device IPv4 address.
Minimum seconds between refreshes. Must be greater than or equal to10.
Maximum allowed age of cached data before access throws.
True to return temperatures in Celsius instead of Fahrenheit.
True to return rainfall in metric units.
True to return wind speed in metric units.
True to return barometer in metric units.

member.name: M:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.#ctor(System.Net.IPAddress,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Initializes a new instance from an .
member.param: The WeatherLink Live device IPv4 address.
Minimum seconds between refreshes. Must be greater than or equal to10.
Maximum allowed age of cached data before access throws.
True to return temperatures in Celsius instead of Fahrenheit.
True to return rainfall in metric units.
True to return wind speed in metric units.
True to return barometer in metric units.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.BarometerAtSeaLevel
member.summary: Gets the sea-level corrected barometric pressure.
member.value: Pressure in inches of mercury, or millimeters when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.BarometerTrend
member.summary: Gets the textual barometer trend.
member.value: A string such as "Rising", "Falling", or "Steady".

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.CelciusTemperature
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether temperatures are returned in Celsius (true) or Fahrenheit (false).
member.value: True for Celsius; otherwise false for Fahrenheit.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.DewPoint
member.summary: Gets the dew point.
member.value: Dew point in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.HeatIndex
member.summary: Gets the heat index.
member.value: Heat index in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.Humidity
member.summary: Gets the current relative humidity.
member.value: Relative humidity as a percentage in the range0–100.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.MetricBarometer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether barometric pressure values are returned in metric units.
member.value: True for metric pressure; otherwise false.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.MetricRain
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether rainfall values are returned in metric units.
member.value: True for metric rainfall; otherwise false.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.MetricWind
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether wind speed values are returned in metric units.
member.value: True for metric wind speeds; otherwise false.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.RainfallLast24Hours
member.summary: Gets the rainfall measured in the last24 hours.
member.value: Rainfall in device units; output is metric when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.RainRate
member.summary: Gets the current rain rate.
member.value: Rain rate in device units; output is metric when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.Temperature
member.summary: Gets the current temperature.
member.value: Temperature in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.ThswIndex
member.summary: Gets the THSW index (Temperature-Humidity-Sun-Wind).
member.value: THSW index in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.ThwIndex
member.summary: Gets the THW index (Temperature-Humidity-Wind).
member.value: THW index in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WetBulb
member.summary: Gets the wet bulb temperature.
member.value: Wet bulb temperature in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindChill
member.summary: Gets the wind chill.
member.value: Wind chill in Fahrenheit, or Celsius when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindDirectionAverage1Minute
member.summary: Gets the1 minute scalar average wind direction.
member.value: Average wind direction in degrees (0–360).

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindDirectionAverage1MinuteCompass
member.summary: Gets the compass direction string for the1 minute average wind direction.
member.value: One of N, NNE, NE, …, N.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindDirectionLast
member.summary: Gets the last wind direction.
member.value: Wind direction in degrees (0–360).

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindDirectionLastCompass
member.summary: Gets the compass direction string for the last wind direction.
member.value: One of N, NNE, NE, …, N.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindSpeedHighLast10Minutes
member.summary: Gets the highest wind speed over the last10 minutes.
member.value: Wind speed in MPH, or KPH when is true.

member.name: P:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.WindSpeedLast
member.summary: Gets the most recent wind speed.
member.value: Wind speed in MPH, or KPH when is true.

member.name: M:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.Dispose
member.summary: Releases HTTP and managed resources used by this instance.

member.name: M:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs asynchronous initialization by fetching the initial dataset. Must be called before accessing any data properties.
member.param: Optional token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous initialization operation.
member.exception: Thrown on network errors while contacting the device.
Thrown when the received JSON cannot be parsed.

member.name: M:WeatherLinkLive.WeatherLinkLiveAPI.WeatherLinkLive.RefreshAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes the cached data asynchronously. Call periodically, or when accessing data becomes stale.
member.param: Optional token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous refresh operation.
member.exception: Thrown on network errors while contacting the device.
Thrown when the received JSON cannot be parsed.
